json_template: {"name": "Provision CRM User", "nodes": [{"parameters": {"httpMethod": "POST", "path": "provision-user", "responseMode": "lastNode", "options": {}}, "name": "Webhook Trigger", "type": "n8n-nodes-base.webhook", "typeVersion": 1, "position": [100, 300]}, {"parameters": {"operation": "executeQuery", "query": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, role TEXT, status TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);"}, "name": "Ensure Table Exists", "type": "n8n-nodes-base.postgres", "typeVersion": 1, "position": [300, 300], "credentials": {"postgres": {"id": "1", "name": "Postgres Local"}}}, {"parameters": {"operation": "executeQuery", "query": "INSERT INTO users (name, role, status) VALUES ('{{$json[\"body\"][\"name\"]}}', '{{$json[\"body\"][\"role\"]}}', 'Active') RETURNING *;"}, "name": "Create User in DB", "type": "n8n-nodes-base.postgres", "typeVersion": 1, "position": [500, 300], "credentials": {"postgres": {"id": "1", "name": "Postgres Local"}}}, {"parameters": {"content": "\u2705 User Created: {{$json[\"name\"]}} (Role: {{$json[\"role\"]}})"}, "name": "Response", "type": "n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook", "typeVersion": 1, "position": [700, 300]}], "connections": {"Webhook Trigger": {"main": [[{"node": "Ensure Table Exists", "type": "main", "index": 0}]]}, "Ensure Table Exists": {"main": [[{"node": "Create User in DB", "type": "main", "index": 0}]]}, "Create User in DB": {"main": [[{"node": "Response", "type": "main", "index": 0}]]}}}
